Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

https://www.dfds.com/en/passenger-ferries/ferry-crossings/ferries-from-jersey
Avvik: 191 | Bestått: 179
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (7 avvik)

CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="w-full max-w-none object-cover" data-test-id="media-content"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

<svg fill="none" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" viewbox="0 0 116 40" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g clip-path="url(#clip0_10619_15936)" id="Brand logo"><path d="M112.184 18.8663L108.1 17.5
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (17 avvik)

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://dfds.com
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://dfds.com --max-pages 21 --format html
